title: Search for a valid GitHub user
description: Verifies that a visitor can search for a valid GitHub username and see the user profile card and recent repositories rendered.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Verify the empty state is visible
Fill in the username field with a valid GitHub username
Submit the search
Verify the user profile card is displayed
Verify recent repositories are displayed

title: Search for a GitHub user and view the profile and recent repositories
description: This verifies that a valid username search returns the user profile card and recent public repositories.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Fill in the search field with a valid GitHub username
Submit the search
Verify the user profile card is displayed
Verify recent public repositories are displayed

title: Block empty username search with inline validation
description: This verifies that submitting an empty search shows validation feedback and prevents an empty lookup.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Submit the search
Verify an inline validation message is displayed

title: See loading while a user lookup is in progress
description: Verifies that submitting a username shows a loading state before the profile results appear.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Fill in the username field with a valid GitHub username
Submit the search
Verify a loading state is visible
Verify the user profile card is displayed

title: Show loading feedback during a user lookup
description: This verifies that submitting a username shows loading feedback while the result is being fetched.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Fill in the search field with a valid GitHub username
Submit the search
Verify a loading state is displayed

title: Block empty username submission
description: Verifies that submitting the search without a username shows inline validation and does not start a lookup.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Submit the search
Verify a validation error is visible
Verify the empty state remains visible

title: Show a not-found message and recover to search again
description: This verifies that an unknown username shows an error state and the user can return to the empty search view.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Fill in the search field with a username that does not exist
Submit the search
Verify a not-found error message is displayed
Choose to try again
Verify the empty search state is displayed

title: Show search recovery after no user is found
description: Verifies that a missing username result shows a not-found message and allows the visitor to return to the empty state and search again.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Fill in the username field with an invalid GitHub username
Submit the search
Verify a not-found message is visible
Click Try Again
Verify the empty state is visible

title: Show search recovery after an error state
description: Verifies that an error result shows a retry option and the visitor can return to the empty state to search again.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Fill in the username field with a GitHub username that triggers an error state
Submit the search
Verify an error message is visible
Click Try Again
Verify the empty state is visible

title: Display only the six most recently updated repositories
description: This verifies that a searched user with many public repositories shows no more than six recent repositories in the results.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Fill in the search field with a valid GitHub username that has more than six public repositories
Submit the search
Verify up to six recent public repositories are displayed

title: Clear and resubmit a username search
description: Verifies that a user can clear a typed username, enter a new one, and successfully run the search again.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Fill in the username field with an initial GitHub username
Use the clear control to empty the username field
Fill in the username field with a different valid GitHub username
Submit the search
Verify the user profile card is displayed
Verify recent repositories are displayed

title: Reset the search field from a loaded result
description: This verifies that the clear control returns the interface to the empty state after a successful lookup.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Fill in the search field with a valid GitHub username
Submit the search
Click the control to clear the search
Verify the empty search state is displayed

title: Show profile details for a valid user
description: Verifies that a successful lookup renders the profile card with optional identity and stats fields visible to the user.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Fill in the username field with a valid GitHub username
Submit the search
Verify the profile avatar is displayed
Verify the user name and profile stats are displayed

title: Show repository details for a user with public repositories
description: Verifies that recent repositories display names, descriptions, language badges, and star counts for a user with public repositories.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Fill in the username field with a valid GitHub username that has public repositories
Submit the search
Verify repository cards are displayed
Verify repository names, descriptions, language badges, and star counts are displayed

title: Search again after returning to the empty state
description: This verifies that after recovering from an error, the user can submit a new username and see fresh results.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Fill in the search field with a username that does not exist
Submit the search
Choose to try again
Fill in the search field with a valid GitHub username
Submit the search
Verify the user profile card is displayed
Verify recent public repositories are displayed

title: Limit the repository list to six items
description: Verifies that only up to six of the most recently updated public repositories are shown after a successful search.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Fill in the username field with a valid GitHub username that has more than six public repositories
Submit the search
Verify no more than six repository cards are displayed
Verify the most recently updated repositories are displayed

title: Show repository details for each recent repository
description: This verifies that the repository list includes the expected details for recent public repositories.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Fill in the search field with a valid GitHub username that has public repositories
Submit the search
Verify repository names, descriptions, language badges, and star counts are displayed

title: Show the no public repositories state
description: This verifies that a user with no public repositories sees the empty repositories message instead of a repository list.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Fill in the search field with a valid GitHub username that has no public repositories
Submit the search
Verify a no public repositories message is displayed

title: Show the no repositories state for a user without public repos
description: Verifies that searching for a user with no public repositories shows the empty repositories message instead of a repository grid.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Fill in the username field with a valid GitHub username that has no public repositories
Submit the search
Verify the no public repositories message is visible
Verify repository cards are not displayed

title: Clear the validation message when typing resumes
description: This verifies that the empty-search validation message disappears as soon as the user starts entering a username.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Submit the search
Fill in the search field with a username
Verify the validation message is cleared
